title: Police investigating a murder case following man's death in Rosemoor
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Conville Police is investigating a murder docket following the death of a 35-year-old man in Miller Street, Rosemoor, on 25 December.


> Southern Cape police spokesperson Warrant Officer Christopher Spies said circumstances surrounding the man's death are under investigation.


"Reports available indicate that Conville police members responded to a fight and on arrival the injured man was already taken to hospital. He was declared deceased by medical personnel on arrival."

The incident happened at about 18:00.

A man has been taken into custody in connection with the killing. He will appear in court once charged, said Spies.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
